smscollectr 0.0.3
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

clean_sheet()
Delete all data rows from a Google Sheet
config_auth()
Save service account credentials to the system keyring
fix_sms()
Attempt to fix a malformed SMS
get_sheet_url()
Retrieve a stored Google Sheet URL from the system credential store
get_sms_max_age()
Get the maximum SMS age
is_agro_sms()
Check whether a string is a valid agrometeorological SMS
is_bad_sms()
Check whether an SMS is malformed
is_gauge_sms()
Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS
is_no_rain()
Check whether a string mentions no rainfall
parse_sms()
Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats)
read_sms()
Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet
set_sheet_url()
Store a Google Sheet URL in the system credential store
set_sms_max_age()
Set the maximum SMS age
sms_auth()
Authenticate with Google Sheets
to_element_id()
Map a TCM variable name to its CLIDATA element abbreviation
to_station_id()
Map a station name to its CLIDATA station code

Developed by Ousmane Ouedraogo.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
